# AIntern

> AIntern bouwt dedicated AI-stagiaires voor MKB-bedrijven — no-cure-no-pay.

AIntern helps Dutch SMEs automate internal business processes with a dedicated AI intern.
Clients only pay when measurable results are delivered (no-cure-no-pay model).

## Services

- AI process automation (invoice processing, inventory management, customer email responses, report generation)
- Dedicated AI intern tailored to each business's existing workflows
- GDPR compliant, no upfront investment required
- Implementation in 4–8 weeks: process analysis → custom AI development → live deployment

## Results

- Up to 40% time savings on manual work
- €1,200+ monthly cost reductions
- 90% fewer data entry errors

## Contact

- Email: info@aintern.nl
- Web: https://aintern.nl

## Pages

- Homepage: https://aintern.nl/
